transcript.text:
(Breaking news!) I haven't had sushi for a long time now
(Tzuyang in a sushi restaurant!!!) I came to a famous sushi place
(Countless orders...)
(The 1st finger injury victim)
(The whole kitchen is in danger...) I've never seen anyone eat this much
(Breaking, Tzuyang raids the sushi place...) (00 Sushi, Mapo-gu, Seoul on January 31st, 2023)
(Mr. Kim / Finger injury victim) I didn't think that she could eat them all..
(But she was calmer than any other time!)
(Even worse, she started to enjoy it..)
(The damage didn't just end here)
(Ordering miso soup 8 times...)
(Oh my goodness)
(I report this eating monster...) 8 times...
Hello, guys!
I came to Sangam-dong in Mapo-gu today
(When did I have it..?) I haven't had sushi for a long time

so I felt like eating sushi today
(Top sushi place in Sangam-dong?!) so I came to a famous sushi place in the neighborhood
This place has more than
('Kim Yeongseop Sushi') 1,000 customer reviews
and everyone says it's good
So I'll go smash the sushi today!
('Kim Yeongseop Sushi' in Mapo-gu, Seoul)
(Entering the restaurant) Hello
There are today's specials!
(Daily specials for each day) Pollack roe with Korean halibut? Sounds good
(Officially scanning the menu!) The menu is here
(A variety of sushi, so exciting!) I'll order all of these...
(Very serious while scanning the menu...)
Hello!
- Hello! - Yes, hello
(Owner is here!) Are you the owner?

- Welcome - Thank you!
First of all...
Kim Yeongseop nigiri (12P), Assorted nigiri(12P), Special nigiri(12P)
Smoked beef nigiri 10P
Eel nigiri 10P
- Are you getting this? Make sure you get it - Yes
And 5P each of raw shrimp nigiri, soy sauce shrimp nigiri, total of 10P
(Clicking away... Haha)
Kimchi halibut nigiri 5P
Halibut fin nigiri 5P
You're getting all this, right?
Yes, of course... Haha
And salmon belly nigiri 5P
Abalone...
The abalone is steamed abalone!
- Abalone nigiri 6P - 6P?

(Chaos)
Are you really gonna eat all of this?
Yes, I will... Haha
That's amazing
(87P! Nigiri order complete!) I'll have that for now
(While she's looking at fried oysters,) They have fried oysters too, sounds delicious
(the kitchen is super busy!!)
(Let's make 87 pieces of nigiri)
(The nigiri that was prepared quickly and the fried oysters that I eventually ordered...)
(87P of nigiri is complete! + Fried oysters)
(Here comes the nigiri!)
(The staff are suffering...)
Is that it?
(Lastly, fried oysters!) Thank you
(and sauce..) Thank you
(Is that... real...?)

(It's real) What should I start with?
Wait, this is such a happy concern
Whenever I come to a sushi restaurant,
I don't know what to eat first...
(It's because you ordered so much...) Which one should I eat first?
Should I eat today's special? Today's nigiri!
Pollack roe halibut is today's nigiri
Where is that...?
Which one is the pollack roe halibut?
(Pink pollack roe halibut!) Oh this one?
This is halibut?
Why is the color...
Halibut and pollack roe...
How did they make it?
Oh it looks pink because there is pollack roe on top of chopped halibut..!
(Bon appétit!) I'll try today's special first

It's delicious...!
The texture is halibut but it tastes like pollack roe!
Next, eel nigiri!
Since I ordered 10P of eel nigiri, I'll eat one first
Delicious
The eel melts in my mouth
It's so soft and it melts
The sauce is so good too
This is a top class eel!
So delicious!
(Tzuyang's official, top class eel nigiri) It's so soft, it just melts
Next, one fried oyster!
Huh? This tastes very familiar
(Dipped in sauce this time!)
Where did I eat this before? It's definitely familiar...
Does it have seaweed in it?

(All I know is that it's definitely delicious!)
(With a big slice of beef!) Smoked beef nigiri
(It got on your face)
Delicious
They have really good sauce here
The fish way bigger than the rice
It's like it's covered in a blanket
Eel
The fish is really big and thick!!
It's very thick
It's scored so it's not tough at all
Salmon this time!
(So happy...)
(Angry because it's so delicious) So delicious! This is a great restaurant!
(Who is next...?) Next....
(Can't choose...) I don't know what to eat next

(Raw shrimp/ abalone/ soy sauce shrimp/ halibut fin/ kimchi halibut/ salmon belly) I'll try one each of these 6 types
Raw shrimp nigiri first!
The shrimp is very plump
Next, abalone nigiri!
(Nice and plump) It's cut in half but it's still so big
Look how thick it is
Soy sauce shrimp
Wow, they're all so good!
(Salmon belly)
I really like salmon belly
The rice is really good too!
It's soft and perfectly cooked!
(Kimchi halibut nom!)
(Can't miss even one grain of rice...)
It's so delicious!
The halibut

itself, not the fin,
is very soft and delicious
(It's halibut fin time!) I like the fin so much!
The fin is the best
It's so good
(Combo) They combined ripe kimchi and halibut fin?
(Can't be bad) It must be delicious!
This ripe kimchi
is very savory
and sour
Top shell
It's very crunchy and delicious
Sea urchin roe nigiri
(So tasty-licious...hehe) It's delicious
(Haven't tried yet) Yukhoe and mackerel nigiri
Actually, this is supposed to be octopus wasabi

but because it's mixed with cucumber,
the owner gave this to me instead!
Since I can't eat cucumbers
How is this yukhoe so tender?
It's more like tuna
I think it's tuna
It's Tuna Battleship!
Why are there so many fried oysters?
Total 87P here!
If I just assume there are 20 oysters,
It's at least 100P!
(Scanning for the next target...)
(Windy...) Since I'm near the entrance, it's a bit cold
(Wear your padded jacket...(?)) I should wear my jacket
(The cold can't beat Tzuyang!)
It's actually warm inside

(She's weak with cold weather..!) I get easily cold so I always shiver at restaurants
The scoring makes it better
It makes the texture better and the look more luxurious
The scoring are definitely something
Eel
Oh, the padded jacket is too bulky...
So I stole PD's vest, LOL
He said he's too warm
Nice, it's good!
Oh! It's warm!
I'll sell it to you for 50,000 won
(I'll pay you back with 50,000 won worth of my love) 50,000 won LOL
I haven't tried it yet
Smoked salmon nigiri!
It's not raw salmon, it's smoked salmon
(New Coke and miso soup are here!) Thanks

(Look at that)
It's delicious!
I like smoked nigiri
because of the pleasant smoky flavor!
The one and only piece...
Mackerel nigiri!
It's hard for mackerel nigiri to be good
It's only good when you eat it super fresh
(Pass) It's delicious
(She's almost vacuuming all the nigiris...)
(What's that on your hair...?)
(I knew it'd happen today as well..!)
What? You didn't get it on my clothes, right?
No way haha
No
I'm wiping it just in case...

(I should get 50,000 won ready, haha) No way
Oh, you saw it, right?
(The inside of the plump fried oyster) It looks like this inside
The ripe kimchi is amazing...!
(Miso soup again...) Thank you
(Continuing to sweep the nigiri and new miso soup...)
(And there comes the new miso soup again...)
(Vinegary shrimp nigiri!) I didn't see that!
(Nigiri -> Miso soup -> Nigiri -> Miso soup...)
(Escape)
(Hahahaha)
Did it fall in here?
(Optimistic) It tastes good to eat mixed as well
It's delicious
(She's always positive when she's eating...) It's good
(Is this real...?)

This abalone nigiri
is also very delicious
The abalone is very thick
(Why is she laughing...?)
(Because she ordered another miso soup...LOL) Thank you
I'm sorry
(Embarrassed)
It's like
when you have a sip of the soup
with the nigiri in the mouth,
the nigiri just melts and it becomes so delicious...
(Nigiri + miso soup unlimited loop!)
(Cute boy approached)
(Nice to meet you, little gent) Hello
Do you know her?
Tzuyang, haha!

Mukbang YouTuber...
(Fascinated)
(Nice seeing you, little gent) Thank you!
It's so delicious
(Oh, right)
(PD's precious vest...)
This is mine now!
It looks better on me, right?
(What are you saying?) That's not true
Hahahaha
It's a thin beef slice
but it has a great flavor and the sauce is tasty!
(Pause)
(She finished another miso soup again...)
(She gives a glance...)
(Huh?! She made eye contact!

(+ Her glance worked!)
(Feeling sorry and thankful at the same time, haha)
Thank you..!
(Pause?)
(I feel uneasy suddenly...)
(She finished another Coke again..)
(And she's giving another glance...)
(Pretending not to see her but...)
(it's obvious she wants another Coke...)
(Chills)
(And the owner says something dangerous...) Take your time
You can stay until it closes today
(Let's just give her two at a time...) Thank you
(Miso soup victim's diary of serving it 8 times...!) 8 times...
(Sinner)
(Let's call it a day today...!)

(Are you ever gonna stop...?)
(She seems fine) The eel is so delicious
(She's drinking the miso soup again...)
He's getting nervous, because of the miso soup
(How did he know...?)
Oh, I'm enjoying it so much till the end!
The last eel nigiri
('Kim Yeongseop Sushi' 87P + fried oysters, ALL CLEAR!)
(Including the last bowl of miso soup...!)
Oh, I had such a pleasant meal today!
Thank you, I enjoyed everything so much!
- I always watch your videos, haha - Oh, really?
I saw the one where you ate salmon
I didn't eat much today, right?
(Don't even say it...!) Not at all!
I'll pack some miso soup for you!

(Miso soup hell) Miso soup? It's okay!
(You can take a whole pot of it) You can take the whole pot with you
(Food and humor, both were great!) I know I asked for too many refills...
- It was an honor to meet you - I really enjoyed food as well!
Like and bookmark(?) it, guys!
(Like, comment, subscribe, and notifications!) Did I say it wrong?
Everything was so good today
and their hospitality was amazing
(I enjoyed the food and laughter!) I was really satisfied!
I had a great meal today as well!
